register.source: Certified 2025 Malava polling-stream register pending; portal Form 35A assignments are used only to bootstrap OCR validation.

candidate_reference.source: Publicly reported leading Malava candidates; the complete legal candidate list and ballot order remain pending source verification.

official_declaration.winner_source: Public reports identify David Athman Ndakwa as the Malava by-election winner; official Form 35B candidate totals are not loaded in this benchmark profile.
official_declaration.runner_up_source: Public reports identify Seth Panyako as the principal challenger.
notes: This profile is an OCR validation benchmark, not a publishable constituency tally.
Only three publicly reported candidate names are configured initially. Candidate totals and V01 remain non-authoritative until the complete legal candidate list and ballot order are source-verified.

methodology.note: Malava's 198 published Form 35A assignments are used as a large handwritten-digit OCR benchmark. Portal-bootstrap rows remain review-only until the certified register and complete candidate roster are loaded.

notes: OCR is a pre-fill only. Human-confirmed benchmark rows are used solely to measure field accuracy.
V01 is not run while the configured candidate roster is incomplete; V02 and control-field checks remain active.
No Malava benchmark row may enter a public election tally through archive-import until the atomic register and complete candidate list are certified.
